{ "name": "mtdowling/jmespath.php", "description": "Declaratively specify how to extract elements from a JSON document", "keywords": ["json", "jsonpath"], "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Graham Campbell", "email": "hello@gjcampbell.co.uk", "homepage": "https://github.com/GrahamCampbell" }, { "name": "Michael Dowling", "email": "mtdowling@gmail.com", "homepage": "https://github.com/mtdowling" } ], "require": { "php": "^7.2.5 || ^8.0", "symfony/polyfill-mbstring": "^1.17" }, "require-dev": { "composer/xdebug-handler": "^3.0.3", "phpunit/phpunit": "^8.5.33" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "JmesPath\\": "src/" }, "files": ["src/JmesPath.php"] }, "bin": ["bin/jp.php"], "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-master": "2.8-dev" } } }
